fire_burst.name: Fire Burst
fire_burst.description: The second Fire Potion deals 50% more damage.

restorative_barrier.name: Restorative Barrier
restorative_barrier.description: Restore 5 HP and gain 4 shield after Life flows into Ward.

reflected_blaze.name: Reflected Blaze
reflected_blaze.description: Convert half of the current shield into bonus Fire damage.

toxic_detonation.name: Toxic Detonation
toxic_detonation.description: Consume the enemy's remaining poison and deal it immediately.

burning_venom.name: Burning Venom
burning_venom.description: Empower poison by 2 damage for its remaining duration.

fortify.name: Fortify
fortify.description: Reinforce Ward and reflect 25% of the next absorbed attack.

regeneration.name: Regeneration
regeneration.description: Regenerate health across the next 3 enemy turns.

venom_ward.name: Venom Ward
venom_ward.description: Gain a toxic ward that retaliates for 3 damage when struck.

inferno_catalyst.name: Inferno Catalyst
inferno_catalyst.description: Ignite all poison and add 24 armor-piercing Fire damage.

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: Restore 12 HP, gain 16 shield, and delay the next attack.

plague_nova.name: Plague Nova
plague_nova.description: Deepen poison by 5 damage and detonate one full poison cycle.
